title: Wedding Budget Calculator - Plan Your Wedding Costs
description: Free wedding budget calculator. Break down your wedding budget by category and see recommended spending percentages for venue, catering, photography, and more.
keywords: wedding budget calculator, wedding cost calculator, wedding planning budget, how much does a wedding cost
intro: Plan your wedding budget with recommended spending percentages. Enter your total budget to see how much to allocate to each category.

faq.q: How much does a wedding cost?
faq.a: The average US wedding costs $30,000-$35,000. Costs vary widely by location, guest count, and choices made.

faq.q: What is the biggest wedding expense?
faq.a: The venue and catering typically account for 40-50% of the total budget, making it the largest single expense.

faq.q: How many guests can I afford?
faq.a: Divide your catering budget by $100-$200 per person (average cost per guest) to estimate your guest count.
